$notes.writer_compat_v1_preview_rfc: icebergWriterCompatV1 is an RFC-stage feature (protocol_rfcs/iceberg-writer-compat-v1.md) not yet ratified in PROTOCOL.md. Cases use the feature name icebergWriterCompatV1-preview per the pre-ratification naming convention. RFC requires: columnMapping AND icebergCompatV2 in writerFeatures, CM in id mode (tightening of ICv2 which allows name or id), physical names must follow the col-[id] convention, ICv2 must be enabled, no byte or short column types.
$notes.id_mode_required: icebergWriterCompatV1 tightens ICv2's column mapping mode requirement from name-or-id to id-only, and further requires physical names to exactly follow the col-[id] convention (physicalName == 'col-' + columnMappingId).

cases.name: iceberg_writer_v1_preview_create_table_2_7_feature_listed_property_true_succeeds
cases.description: Creating a (2,7)+[columnMapping,icebergCompatV2,icebergWriterCompatV1-preview] table with id-mode CM, col-[id] physical names, ICv2 active, and delta.enableIcebergWriterCompatV1=true succeeds.

cases.name: iceberg_writer_v1_preview_supported_not_active_create_table_succeeds
cases.description: Creating a (2,7)+[columnMapping,icebergCompatV2,icebergWriterCompatV1-preview] table without delta.enableIcebergWriterCompatV1=true succeeds; icebergWriterCompatV1-preview writer requirements only apply when the feature is active.

cases.name: iceberg_writer_v1_preview_create_table_2_7_missing_iceberg_compat_v2_fails
cases.description: Creating a (2,7)+[columnMapping,icebergWriterCompatV1-preview] table without icebergCompatV2 in writerFeatures and delta.enableIcebergWriterCompatV1=true fails; the RFC requires icebergCompatV2 to be co-listed as a protocol-level prerequisite.

cases.name: iceberg_writer_v1_preview_create_table_2_7_iceberg_compat_v2_not_active_fails
cases.description: Creating a (2,7)+[columnMapping,icebergCompatV2,icebergWriterCompatV1-preview] table with delta.enableIcebergWriterCompatV1=true but without delta.enableIcebergCompatV2=true fails; the RFC requires ICv2 to be enabled (not merely supported) when icebergWriterCompatV1 is active.

cases.name: iceberg_writer_v1_preview_create_table_2_7_column_mapping_name_mode_fails
cases.description: Creating a (2,7)+[columnMapping,icebergCompatV2,icebergWriterCompatV1-preview] table with delta.enableIcebergWriterCompatV1=true and columnMapping mode=name fails; the RFC tightens ICv2's name-or-id requirement to id-only.

cases.name: iceberg_writer_v1_preview_create_table_2_7_byte_column_fails
cases.description: Creating a (2,7)+[columnMapping,icebergCompatV2,icebergWriterCompatV1-preview] table with delta.enableIcebergWriterCompatV1=true and a byte-type column fails; the RFC forbids byte and short column types.
